ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment where the data was collected */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the data */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the dataset */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the dataset is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Detailed description of the methodology used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the file is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF, MD) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the file is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "xi_1_values" (
  "xi_1_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each xi_1 value */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the value belongs to */,
  "xi_1_value" REAL /* Value of xi_1 measured */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for xi_1 */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to measure xi_1 */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the value is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("xi_1_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_xi_1_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "xi_2_values" (
  "xi_2_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each xi_2 value */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the value belongs to */,
  "xi_2_value" REAL /* Value of xi_2 measured */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for xi_2 */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to measure xi_2 */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the value is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("xi_2_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_xi_2_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "u_values" (
  "u_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each u value */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the value belongs to */,
  "u_x" REAL /* Value of u_x measured */,
  "u_y" REAL /* Value of u_y measured */,
  "u_z" REAL /* Value of u_z measured */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for u */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to measure u */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the value is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("u_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_u_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theta_values" (
  "theta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theta value */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the value belongs to */,
  "theta_1" REAL /* Value of theta_1 measured */,
  "theta_2" REAL /* Value of theta_2 measured */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for theta */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to measure theta */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the value is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theta_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
